!DOCTYPE html html lang=fr head meta charset=UTF-8 meta name=viewport content=width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0 titleYoutZo Custom Skinstitle link rel=preconnect href=httpsfonts.googleapis.com link href=httpsfonts.googleapis.comcss2family=Cinzelwght@400;600;700&family=Rajdhaniwght@300;400;500;600&family=Orbitronwght@400;700;900&family=IM+Fell+Englishital@0;1&display=swap rel=stylesheet style root { --red #c0392b; --red-dark #7b1a13; --red-glow #e74c3c; --gold #c8aa6e; --gold-bright #f0e2a0; --gold-dark#785a28; --black #080608; --bg #0c080a; --bg2 #110a0d; --bg3 #160e10; --text #e8d5c4; --text-dim #8a6a6a; } { margin0; padding0; box-sizingborder-box; } body { background var(--bg); color var(--text); font-family 'Rajdhani', sans-serif; min-height 100vh; overflow-x hidden; } ── CLOCK DECO (CSS only, no images) ── .clock-deco { position fixed; pointer-events none; z-index 0; } .clock-deco.tl { top -80px; left -80px; } .clock-deco.br { bottom -80px; right -80px; transform rotate(180deg); } .clock-svg { width 240px; height 240px; opacity 0.06; } ── BACKGROUND PATTERN ── bodybefore { content ''; position fixed; inset 0; z-index 0; background radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 50% 0%, #7b1a1318 0%, transparent 65%), radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 30% at 0% 50%, #c8aa6e08 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 30% at 100% 50%,#c8aa6e08 0%, transparent 50%); pointer-events none; } Roman numeral ring pattern bodyafter { content ''; position fixed; inset 0; z-index 0; background-image repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 79px, #c8aa6e05 80px), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, transparent 79px, #c8aa6e05 80px); pointer-events none; } ── HERO ── .hero { position relative; z-index 1; padding 52px 20px 38px; text-align center; border-bottom 1px solid #c8aa6e18; overflow hidden; } Kurumi eye clock ring behind title .hero-ring { position absolute; width 320px; height 320px; border-radius 50%; border 1px solid #c8aa6e12; top 50%; left 50%; transform translate(-50%, -50%); pointer-events none; } .hero-ringbefore { content ''; position absolute; inset 16px; border-radius 50%; border 1px solid #c0392b0e; } .hero-ringafter { content ''; position absolute; inset 32px; border-radius 50%; border 1px solid #c8aa6e08; } Rotating clock hand .clock-hand { position absolute; top 50%; left 50%; width 130px; height 1px; background linear-gradient(90deg, #c0392b00, #c0392b55); transform-origin 0 50%; transform translate(0, -50%) rotate(0deg); animation rotate 60s linear infinite; pointer-events none; } .clock-hand.short { width 90px; background linear-gradient(90deg, #c8aa6e00, #c8aa6e44); animation-duration 720s; } @keyframes rotate { to { transform translate(0,-50%) rotate(360deg); } } .brand-tag { font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 9px; letter-spacing 8px; color var(--red-dark); text-transform uppercase; margin-bottom 14px; display block; } .hero h1 { font-family 'IM Fell English', serif; font-size clamp(28px, 7vw, 58px); font-weight 400; color var(--gold); letter-spacing 2px; line-height 1.1; text-shadow 0 0 40px #c8aa6e22, 0 2px 0 #000; position relative; } .hero h1 .r { color var(--red-glow); text-shadow 0 0 20px #e74c3c44; } .divider { width 180px; height 1px; background linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #c0392b, var(--gold), #c0392b, transparent); margin 18px auto; position relative; } .dividerbefore { content '✦'; position absolute; top 50%; left 50%; transform translate(-50%,-50%); background var(--bg); color var(--gold); padding 0 8px; font-size 10px; } .hero-sub { font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 10px; color var(--text-dim); letter-spacing 4px; text-transform uppercase; } ── GLOBAL STATS ── .stats { display flex; justify-content center; gap 44px; margin-top 24px; flex-wrap wrap; } .stat { text-align center; } .stat-num { font-family 'IM Fell English', serif; font-size 26px; color var(--gold-bright); display block; } .stat-num.pop { animation statpop .35s ease; } @keyframes statpop { 0% { transformscale(1); } 40% { transformscale(1.4); color#fff; } 100%{ transformscale(1); } } .stat-lbl { font-size 9px; color var(--red-dark); letter-spacing 3px; text-transform uppercase; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; } ── NAV ── nav { background #080508; border-bottom 1px solid #c0392b22; display flex; justify-content center; overflow-x auto; position sticky; top 0; z-index 100; } .nav-btn { padding 15px 22px; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 10px; letter-spacing 2px; text-transform uppercase; color #4a2222; background none; border none; cursor pointer; border-bottom 2px solid transparent; transition all .2s; white-space nowrap; } .nav-btnhover { color var(--gold); border-bottom-color #c8aa6e44; } .nav-btn.active { color var(--red-glow); border-bottom-color var(--red-glow); } ── CONTROLS ── .controls { max-width 1100px; margin 0 auto; padding 20px 20px 12px; position relative; z-index 1; } .search-wrap { display flex; gap 10px; margin-bottom 14px; } .search-wrap input { flex 1; background var(--bg2); border 1px solid #c0392b22; color var(--text); padding 11px 18px; font-family 'Rajdhani', sans-serif; font-size 15px; letter-spacing 1px; outline none; border-radius 1px; transition border-color .2s; } .search-wrap inputplaceholder { color #4a2222; } .search-wrap inputfocus { border-color #c0392b55; } .filter-row { display flex; gap 8px; flex-wrap wrap; } .chip { padding 6px 14px; border 1px solid #c0392b22; background none; color #6b3a3a; font-family 'Rajdhani', sans-serif; font-size 12px; letter-spacing 1px; cursor pointer; border-radius 1px; transition all .2s; text-transform uppercase; font-weight 500; } .chiphover { border-color #c0392b55; color var(--text); background #c0392b0a; } .chip.active { border-color var(--red); color var(--gold); background #c0392b14; } ── GRID ── .grid { display grid; grid-template-columns repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap 3px; padding 20px 20px 50px; max-width 1100px; margin 0 auto; position relative; z-index 1; } ── CARD ── .card { background var(--bg2); border 1px solid #c0392b18; position relative; overflow hidden; transition all .3s; cursor pointer; display flex; flex-direction column; animation fadein .35s ease both; } @keyframes fadein { from { opacity0; transformtranslateY(10px); } to { opacity1; transformtranslateY(0); } } .cardhover { border-color #c0392b66; transform translateY(-3px); box-shadow 0 8px 30px #0008, 0 0 20px #c0392b0a; } .cardhover .overlay { opacity 1; } .cardhover .card-img { transform scale(1.04); } .img-wrap { width 100%; aspect-ratio 169; overflow hidden; position relative; background var(--bg3); } .card-img { width 100%; height 100%; object-fit cover; display block; transition transform .4s ease; } .img-placeholder { width 100%; height 100%; display flex; flex-direction column; align-items center; justify-content center; gap 10px; background linear-gradient(135deg, #1a0c10 0%, #0c080a 100%); } .ph-icon { font-size 36px; opacity .2; } .ph-txt { font-size 10px; color #4a2222; letter-spacing 2px; text-transform uppercase; } style tag .style-tag { position absolute; bottom 8px; left 8px; padding 3px 9px; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 9px; letter-spacing 2px; text-transform uppercase; font-weight 700; border-radius 1px; } .style-anime { background #c0392b; color #fff0f0; } .style-lol { background #c8aa6e; color #0a0000; } .style-jv { background #4a1a1a; color #c8aa6e; border 1px solid #c8aa6e44; } .style-noel { background #1a3a1a; color #a0e0a0; border 1px solid #40a04044; } .style-halloween { background #2a1400; color #ff8c00; border 1px solid #ff6a0066; } .badge { position absolute; top 8px; right 8px; padding 3px 9px; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 9px; letter-spacing 2px; font-weight 700; text-transform uppercase; border-radius 1px; } .badge-new { background var(--gold); color #0a0000; } .badge-hot { background var(--red-glow); color #fff; } .overlay { position absolute; inset 0; background linear-gradient(0deg, #080508cc 0%, #08050855 55%, transparent 100%); opacity 0; transition opacity .3s; display flex; align-items flex-end; padding 14px; pointer-events none; } .dl-btn { width 100%; background linear-gradient(90deg, var(--red-dark), var(--red)); color #fff; border none; padding 9px 16px; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 10px; letter-spacing 2px; cursor pointer; text-transform uppercase; font-weight 700; transition all .2s; border-radius 1px; } .dl-btnhover { background linear-gradient(90deg, var(--red), #e74c3c); } .dl-btn.done { background #1a3a1a; color #6eaa6e; } .card-info { padding 12px 14px; flex 1; } .card-champ { font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 10px; color var(--red-dark); letter-spacing 3px; text-transform uppercase; } .card-name { font-family 'IM Fell English', serif; font-size 17px; color var(--gold); margin-top 3px; line-height 1.2; } .card-footer { display flex; justify-content space-between; align-items center; margin-top 10px; border-top 1px solid #c0392b11; padding-top 8px; } .card-role { font-size 10px; color #4a2222; letter-spacing 2px; text-transform uppercase; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; } .card-counters { display flex; gap 12px; } .ctr { font-size 12px; color #6b3a3a; display flex; align-items center; gap 3px; transition color .2s; font-weight 500; } .ctr.lit { color var(--gold); } .empty { grid-column 1-1; text-align center; padding 60px 20px; color #4a2222; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 12px; letter-spacing 3px; } ── PROPOSE SKIN BTN ── .propose-wrap { text-align center; padding 0 20px 50px; position relative; z-index 1; } .propose-btn { padding 14px 44px; border 1px solid #c0392b55; background none; color var(--gold); font-family 'IM Fell English', serif; font-size 15px; letter-spacing 3px; cursor pointer; transition all .2s; position relative; overflow hidden; } .propose-btnbefore { content ''; position absolute; inset 0; background linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #c0392b0a, transparent); transform translateX(-100%); transition transform .4s; } .propose-btnhover { border-color var(--red); } .propose-btnhoverbefore { transform translateX(100%); } ── FOOTER ── footer { border-top 1px solid #c0392b11; padding 32px 20px; text-align center; position relative; z-index 1; } .footer-txt { font-size 10px; color #2e1a1a; letter-spacing 2px; line-height 2.4; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; } .footer-txt span { color var(--red-dark); } ── ROMAN NUMERALS ON CLOCK ── .numerals { position fixed; pointer-events none; z-index 0; font-family 'IM Fell English', serif; font-size 11px; color #c8aa6e07; user-select none; } .n-tl { top 20px; left 20px; } .n-tr { top 20px; right 20px; text-align right; } .n-bl { bottom 20px; left 20px; } .n-br { bottom 20px; right 20px; text-align right; } ── SKIN DETAIL PAGE ── .detail-overlay { display none; position fixed; inset 0; z-index 1000; background var(--bg); overflow-y auto; animation fadeInPage .25s ease; } .detail-overlay.open { display block; } @keyframes fadeInPage { from { opacity0; transformtranslateY(10px); } to { opacity1; transformtranslateY(0); } } .detail-topbar { position sticky; top 0; z-index 10; background var(--bg); border-bottom 1px solid #c0392b18; padding 12px 24px; display flex; align-items center; gap 16px; } .detail-back { display inline-flex; align-items center; gap 6px; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 9px; letter-spacing 3px; text-transform uppercase; color var(--text-dim); background none; border none; cursor pointer; transition color .2s; padding 0; } .detail-backbefore { content '←'; font-size 13px; } .detail-backhover { color var(--gold); } .detail-breadcrumb { font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 9px; letter-spacing 2px; color #3a1a1a; text-transform uppercase; } .detail-breadcrumb span { color var(--red-dark); } .detail-hero { width 100%; height 180px; position relative; overflow hidden; background var(--bg3); } .detail-hero-img { width 100%; height 100%; object-fit cover; object-position center 20%; display block; filter brightness(0.3); } .detail-hero-overlay { position absolute; inset 0; background linear-gradient(90deg, #0c080af0 0%, #0c080a99 50%, transparent 100%), linear-gradient(0deg, #0c080a 0%, transparent 80%); } .detail-hero-content { position absolute; top 50%; left 40px; transform translateY(-50%); display flex; flex-direction column; justify-content center; } .detail-hero-champ { font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 9px; letter-spacing 5px; text-transform uppercase; color var(--red-dark); margin-bottom 6px; } .detail-hero-name { font-family 'IM Fell English', serif; font-size clamp(26px, 4vw, 42px); color var(--gold); line-height 1; text-shadow 0 2px 20px #00000088; } .detail-body { max-width 1140px; margin 0 auto; padding 24px 24px 80px; display grid; grid-template-columns 1fr 380px; gap 32px; align-items start; } @media (max-width 900px) { .detail-body { grid-template-columns 1fr; } .detail-hero { height 130px; } .detail-hero-content { left 20px; } } LEFT COL .detail-video-wrap { width 100%; aspect-ratio 169; background #080508; border 1px solid #c0392b22; overflow hidden; border-radius 2px; position relative; } .detail-video-wrap iframe { width100%; height100%; bordernone; displayblock; } .detail-video-placeholder { width100%; height100%; displayflex; flex-directioncolumn; align-itemscenter; justify-contentcenter; gap12px; background linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0c10,#0c080a); color#4a2222; font-family'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size10px; letter-spacing3px; text-transformuppercase; } .detail-section-title { font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 9px; letter-spacing 4px; text-transform uppercase; color var(--red-dark); margin 28px 0 12px; } .detail-desc { font-family 'Rajdhani', sans-serif; font-size 15px; line-height 1.75; color var(--text-dim); } .detail-features { display flex; flex-wrap wrap; gap 8px; margin-top 14px; } .detail-feature-tag { padding 5px 14px; border 1px solid #c8aa6e33; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 9px; letter-spacing 2px; text-transform uppercase; color var(--gold-dark); border-radius 1px; } RIGHT COL - INFO CARD .detail-info-card { background var(--bg2); border 1px solid #c0392b18; padding 24px; border-radius 2px; } .detail-stats-row { display flex; gap 24px; margin-bottom 20px; padding-bottom 18px; border-bottom 1px solid #c0392b11; } .detail-stat { text-align center; } .detail-stat-num { font-family 'IM Fell English', serif; font-size 22px; color var(--gold-bright); display block; } .detail-stat-lbl { font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 8px; letter-spacing 3px; color var(--red-dark); text-transform uppercase; } .detail-info-row { display flex; align-items center; gap 10px; padding 11px 0; border-bottom 1px solid #c0392b08; font-family 'Rajdhani', sans-serif; } .detail-info-rowlast-of-type { border-bottom none; } .detail-info-icon { font-size 14px; width 20px; text-align center; opacity .7; } .detail-info-label { font-size 11px; letter-spacing 2px; text-transform uppercase; color var(--text-dim); width 110px; flex-shrink 0; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; } .detail-info-value { font-size 14px; color var(--text); font-weight 500; } .detail-info-badge { padding 3px 10px; border-radius 1px; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 9px; letter-spacing 1px; text-transform uppercase; } .detail-creator-box { display flex; align-items center; gap 12px; padding 14px; background var(--bg3); border 1px solid #c8aa6e11; border-radius 2px; margin-top 20px; } .detail-creator-avatar { width 42px; height 42px; border-radius 50%; background linear-gradient(135deg, var(--red-dark), #c8aa6e44); display flex; align-items center; justify-content center; font-family 'IM Fell English', serif; font-size 18px; color var(--gold); flex-shrink 0; } .detail-creator-name { font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 10px; letter-spacing 2px; color var(--gold); text-transform uppercase; } .detail-creator-role { font-family 'Rajdhani', sans-serif; font-size 12px; color var(--text-dim); margin-top 2px; } .detail-dl-btn { width 100%; padding 16px 24px; margin-top 20px; background linear-gradient(90deg, var(--red-dark), var(--red)); color #fff; border none; cursor pointer; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 11px; letter-spacing 3px; text-transform uppercase; font-weight 700; transition all .2s; border-radius 1px; position relative; overflow hidden; } .detail-dl-btnafter { content''; positionabsolute; inset0; backgroundlinear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#ffffff10,transparent); transformtranslateX(-100%); transitiontransform .5s; } .detail-dl-btnhover { backgroundlinear-gradient(90deg,var(--red),#e74c3c); } .detail-dl-btnhoverafter { transformtranslateX(100%); } .detail-dl-btn.done { background#1a3a1a; color#6eaa6e; } .detail-license { text-align center; margin-top 12px; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 8px; letter-spacing 2px; color #2e1a1a; text-transform uppercase; } stylet=width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0 titleYoutZo Custom Skinstitle link rel=preconnect href=httpsfonts.googleapis.com link href=httpsfonts.googleapis.comcss2family=Cinzelwght@400;600;700&family=Rajdhaniwght@300;400;500;600&family=Orbitronwght@400;700;900&family=IM+Fell+Englishital@0;1&display=swap rel=stylesheet style linear-gradient(135deg, #1a0c10 0%, #0c080a 100%); } .ph-icon { font-size 36px; opacity .2; } .ph-txt { font-size 10px; color #4a2222; letter-spacing 2px; text-transform uppercase; } style tag .style-tag { position absolute; bottom 8px; left 8px; padding 3px 9px; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 9px; letter-spacing 2px; text-transform uppercase; font-weight 700; border-radius 1px; } .style-anime { background #c0392b; color #fff0f0; } .style-lol { background #c8aa6e; color #0a0000; } .style-jv { background #4a1a1a; color #c8aa6e; border 1px solid #c8aa6e44; } .style-noel { background #1a3a1a; color #a0e0a0; border 1px solid #40a04044; } .style-halloween { background #2a1400; color #ff8c00; border 1px solid #ff6a0066; } .badge { position absolute; top 8px; right 8px; padding 3px 9px; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 9px; letter-spacing 2px; font-weight 700; text-transform uppercase; border-radius 1px; } .badge-new { background var(--gold); color #0a0000; } .badge-hot { background var(--red-glow); color #fff; } .overlay { position absolute; inset 0; background linear-gradient(0deg, #080508cc 0%, #08050855 55%, transparent 100%); opacity 0; transition opacity .3s; display flex; align-items flex-end; padding 14px; pointer-events none; } .dl-btn { width 100%; background linear-gradient(90deg, var(--red-dark), var(--red)); color #fff; border none; padding 9px 16px; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 10px; letter-spacing 2px; cursor pointer; text-transform uppercase; font-weight 700; transition all .2s; border-radius 1px; } .dl-btnhover { background linear-gradient(90deg, var(--red), #e74c3c); } .dl-btn.done { background #1a3a1a; color #6eaa6e; } .card-info { padding 12px 14px; flex 1; } .card-champ { font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 10px; color var(--red-dark); letter-spacing 3px; text-transform uppercase; } .card-name { font-family 'IM Fell English', serif; font-size 17px; color var(--gold); margin-top 3px; line-height 1.2; } .card-footer { display flex; justify-content space-between; align-items center; margin-top 10px; border-top 1px solid #c0392b11; padding-top 8px; } .card-role { font-size 10px; color #4a2222; letter-spacing 2px; text-transform uppercase; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; } .card-counters { display flex; gap 12px; } .ctr { font-size 12px; color #6b3a3a; display flex; align-items center; gap 3px; transition color .2s; font-weight 500; } .ctr.lit { color var(--gold); } .empty { grid-column 1-1; text-align center; padding 60px 20px; color #4a2222; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 12px; letter-spacing 3px; } ── PROPOSE SKIN BTN ── .propose-wrap { text-align center; padding 0 20px 50px; position relative; z-index 1; } .propose-btn { padding 14px 44px; border 1px solid #c0392b55; background none; color var(--gold); font-family 'IM Fell English', serif; font-size 15px; letter-spacing 3px; cursor pointer; transition all .2s; position relative; overflow hidden; } .propose-btnbefore { content ''; position absolute; inset 0; background linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #c0392b0a, transparent); transform translateX(-100%); transition transform .4s; } .propose-btnhover { border-color var(--red); } .propose-btnhoverbefore { transform translateX(100%); } ── FOOTER ── footer { border-top 1px solid #c0392b11; padding 32px 20px; text-align center; position relative; z-index 1; } .footer-txt { font-size 10px; color #2e1a1a; letter-spacing 2px; line-height 2.4; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; } .footer-txt span { color var(--red-dark); } ── ROMAN NUMERALS ON CLOCK ── .numerals { position fixed; pointer-events none; z-index 0; font-family 'IM Fell English', serif; font-size 11px; color #c8aa6e07; user-select none; } .n-tl { top 20px; left 20px; } .n-tr { top 20px; right 20px; text-align right; } .n-bl { bottom 20px; left 20px; } .n-br { bottom 20px; right 20px; text-align right; } ── SKIN DETAIL PAGE ── .detail-overlay { display none; position fixed; inset 0; z-index 1000; background var(--bg); overflow-y auto; animation fadeInPage .25s ease; } .detail-overlay.open { display block; } @keyframes fadeInPage { from { opacity 0; transform translateY(12px); } to { opacity 1; transform translateY(0); } } .detail-back { display inline-flex; align-items center; gap 8px; padding 16px 24px; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 10px; letter-spacing 3px; text-transform uppercase; color var(--text-dim); background none; border none; cursor pointer; transition color .2s; position sticky; top 0; z-index 10; background var(--bg); border-bottom 1px solid #c0392b11; width 100%; text-align left; } .detail-backhover { color var(--gold); } .detail-backbefore { content '←'; font-size 14px; } .detail-body { max-width 1100px; margin 0 auto; padding 40px 24px 80px; display grid; grid-template-columns 1fr 420px; gap 48px; align-items start; } @media (max-width 860px) { .detail-body { grid-template-columns 1fr; gap 28px; } } .detail-video-col {} .detail-video-wrap { width 100%; aspect-ratio 169; background #0c080a; border 1px solid #c0392b22; overflow hidden; position relative; } .detail-video-wrap iframe { width 100%; height 100%; border none; display block; } .detail-video-placeholder { width 100%; height 100%; display flex; flex-direction column; align-items center; justify-content center; gap 12px; background linear-gradient(135deg, #1a0c10 0%, #0c080a 100%); color #4a2222; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 10px; letter-spacing 3px; text-transform uppercase; } .detail-champ-label { margin-top 14px; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 10px; color var(--red-dark); letter-spacing 4px; text-transform uppercase; } .detail-skin-name { font-family 'IM Fell English', serif; font-size clamp(22px, 4vw, 34px); color var(--gold); line-height 1.15; margin 6px 0 16px; } .detail-tags { display flex; gap 8px; flex-wrap wrap; margin-bottom 20px; } .detail-tag { padding 4px 12px; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 9px; letter-spacing 2px; text-transform uppercase; border-radius 1px; border 1px solid #c0392b33; color var(--text-dim); } .detail-divider { height 1px; background linear-gradient(90deg, #c0392b44, transparent); margin 20px 0; } .detail-desc-label { font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 9px; letter-spacing 4px; text-transform uppercase; color var(--red-dark); margin-bottom 12px; } .detail-desc { font-family 'Rajdhani', sans-serif; font-size 16px; line-height 1.7; color var(--text-dim); margin-bottom 32px; } .detail-stats { display flex; gap 28px; margin-bottom 28px; } .detail-stat { text-align center; } .detail-stat-num { font-family 'IM Fell English', serif; font-size 22px; color var(--gold-bright); display block; } .detail-stat-lbl { font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 8px; letter-spacing 3px; color var(--red-dark); text-transform uppercase; } .detail-dl-btn { width 100%; padding 18px 24px; background linear-gradient(90deg, var(--red-dark), var(--red)); color #fff; border none; cursor pointer; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 12px; letter-spacing 3px; text-transform uppercase; font-weight 700; transition all .2s; border-radius 1px; position relative; overflow hidden; } .detail-dl-btnafter { content ''; position absolute; inset 0; background linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #ffffff10, transparent); transform translateX(-100%); transition transform .5s; } .detail-dl-btnhover { background linear-gradient(90deg, var(--red), #e74c3c); } .detail-dl-btnhoverafter { transform translateX(100%); } .detail-dl-btn.done { background #1a3a1a; color #6eaa6e; letter-spacing 4px; } ── PAGINATION ── .pagination { display flex; justify-content center; align-items center; gap 8px; padding 20px 20px 50px; position relative; z-index 1; } .page-btn { padding 8px 16px; border 1px solid #c0392b33; background none; color #6b3a3a; font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 10px; letter-spacing 2px; cursor pointer; border-radius 1px; transition all .2s; text-transform uppercase; } .page-btnhover { border-color #c0392b66; color var(--gold); } .page-btn.active { border-color var(--red); color var(--gold); background #c0392b14; } .page-btndisabled { opacity 0.3; cursor default; } .page-info { font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 10px; color #4a2222; letter-spacing 2px; padding 0 8px; } ── FIREBASE AUTH ── .auth-bar { position fixed; top 0; right 0; z-index 9999; display flex; align-items center; gap 10px; padding 10px 18px; background linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #080508ee); pointer-events auto; } .auth-btn { display flex; align-items center; gap 8px; padding 8px 16px; border 1px solid #c0392b55; background #110a0d; color var(--gold); font-family 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size 9px; letter-spacing 2px; text-transform uppercase; cursor pointer; border-radius 1px; transition all .2s; } .auth-btnhover { border-color var(--red); background #1a0c10; } .auth-avatar { width 32px; height 32px; border-radius 50%; border 1px solid #c8aa6e44; cursor pointer; transition border-color .2s; object-fit cover; } .auth-avatarhover { border-color var(--gold); } ── PROFILE PANEL ── .profile-panel { display none; position fixed; top 0; right 0; bottom 0; width 360px; z-index 10000; background var(--bg2); border-left 1px solid #c0392b22; overflow-y auto; padding-bottom 40px; } .profile-panel.open { display block; animation slideIn .25s ease; } @keyframes slideIn { from{transformtranslateX(100%);opacity0} to{transformtranslateX(0);opacity1} } .profile-topbar { display flex; align-items center; justify-content space-between; padding 16px 20px; border-bottom 1px solid #c0392b18; background var(--bg); position sticky; top 0; z-index 5; } .profile-title { font-family'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size10px; letter-spacing3px; text-transformuppercase; colorvar(--gold); } .profile-close { backgroundnone; bordernone; colorvar(--text-dim); font-size18px; cursorpointer; padding4px; transitioncolor .2s; line-height1; } .profile-closehover { colorvar(--gold); } .profile-header { displayflex; flex-directioncolumn; align-itemscenter; padding24px 20px 18px; border-bottom1px solid #c0392b11; text-aligncenter; } .profile-photo { width68px; height68px; border-radius50%; border2px solid #c8aa6e44; margin-bottom10px; object-fitcover; } .profile-name { font-family'IM Fell English',serif; font-size19px; colorvar(--gold); } .profile-email { font-family'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size8px; letter-spacing2px; colorvar(--text-dim); margin-top4px; } .profile-section { padding 18px 20px 0; } .profile-section-title { font-family'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size9px; letter-spacing3px; text-transformuppercase; colorvar(--red-dark); margin-bottom12px; padding-bottom7px; border-bottom1px solid #c0392b11; } .profile-empty { color#4a2222; font-family'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size9px; letter-spacing2px; text-aligncenter; padding16px; } .profile-liked-grid { displaygrid; grid-template-columns1fr 1fr; gap8px; } .profile-skin-mini { backgroundvar(--bg3); border1px solid #c0392b11; cursorpointer; transitionborder-color .2s; overflowhidden; border-radius1px; } .profile-skin-minihover { border-color#c0392b55; } .profile-skin-mini img { width100%; aspect-ratio169; object-fitcover; displayblock; } .profile-skin-mini-info { padding5px 7px; } .profile-skin-mini-champ { font-family'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size7px; colorvar(--red-dark); letter-spacing2px; } .profile-skin-mini-name { font-family'IM Fell English',serif; font-size12px; colorvar(--gold); } .profile-logout-btn { displayblock; widthcalc(100% - 40px); margin20px 20px 0; padding11px 20px; border1px solid #c0392b33; backgroundnone; color#8a4a4a; font-family'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size9px; letter-spacing2px; text-transformuppercase; cursorpointer; border-radius1px; transitionall .2s; } .profile-logout-btnhover { border-colorvar(--red); colorvar(--red-glow); } .profile-overlay-bg { displaynone; positionfixed; inset0; z-index9999; background#00000066; backdrop-filterblur(2px); } .profile-overlay-bg.open { displayblock; } ── UPLOAD ── .upload-section { padding18px 20px 0; } .upload-drop { border1px dashed #c0392b44; backgroundvar(--bg3); padding22px 16px; text-aligncenter; cursorpointer; border-radius1px; transitionborder-color .2s; margin-bottom10px; } .upload-drophover,.upload-drop.dragover { border-colorvar(--gold); } .upload-drop-icon { font-size24px; margin-bottom6px; } .upload-drop-txt { font-family'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size9px; color#6b3a3a; letter-spacing2px; } .upload-input-row { margin-bottom8px; } .upload-label { displayblock; font-family'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size8px; letter-spacing2px; colorvar(--red-dark); margin-bottom4px; text-transformuppercase; } .upload-input { width100%; backgroundvar(--bg); border1px solid #c0392b22; colorvar(--text); padding8px 12px; font-family'Rajdhani',sans-serif; font-size14px; outlinenone; border-radius1px; transitionborder-color .2s; } .upload-inputfocus { border-color#c0392b55; } .upload-submit { width100%; padding12px 20px; margin-top4px; backgroundlinear-gradient(90deg,var(--red-dark),var(--red)); color#fff; bordernone; cursorpointer; font-family'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size10px; letter-spacing3px; text-transformuppercase; border-radius1px; transitionall .2s; } .upload-submithover { backgroundlinear-gradient(90deg,var(--red),#e74c3c); } .upload-submitdisabled { background#2a1a1a; color#4a2222; cursordefault; } .upload-status { margin-top8px; font-family'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size9px; letter-spacing2px; text-aligncenter; min-height16px; } .upload-status.ok { color#6eaa6e; } .upload-status.err { colorvar(--red-glow); } ── LIKE BUTTON ── .detail-like-btn { displayflex; align-itemscenter; justify-contentcenter; gap8px; width100%; padding12px 20px; margin-top10px; border1px solid #c0392b44; backgroundnone; color#8a4a4a; font-family'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size10px; letter-spacing2px; text-transformuppercase; cursorpointer; border-radius1px; transitionall .2s; } .detail-like-btnhover { border-colorvar(--red); colorvar(--red-glow); } .detail-like-btn.liked { border-color#c0392b99; colorvar(--red-glow); background#c0392b14; } ── SUBSCRIBE BUTTON ── .detail-sub-btn { displayflex; align-itemscenter; justify-contentcenter; gap8px; width100%; padding12px 20px; margin-top10px; border1px solid #c8aa6e55; cursorpointer; border-radius1px; transitionall .2s; backgroundlinear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold-dark),#a07840); color#fff; font-family'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size10px; letter-spacing2px; text-transformuppercase; font-weight700; } .detail-sub-btnhover { backgroundlinear-gradient(90deg,#a07840,var(--gold)); transformtranslateY(-1px); } .detail-sub-btn.subscribed { backgroundnone; border-color#c8aa6e33; colorvar(--gold-dark); } .detail-sub-btn.subscribedhover { border-colorvar(--red); colorvar(--red-glow); transformnone; } ── TOAST ── .toast { positionfixed; bottom30px; left50%; transformtranslateX(-50%) translateY(80px); background#1a0c10; border1px solid #c0392b44; colorvar(--gold); padding10px 24px; font-family'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size9px; letter-spacing2px; text-transformuppercase; border-radius1px; z-index99999; transitiontransform .3s ease; white-spacenowrap; pointer-eventsnone; } .toast.show { transformtranslateX(-50%) translateY(0); } style head body !-- ── AUTH BAR ── -- div class=auth-bar id=profileSubBtn onclick=fbToggleSubscribe() ✦ span id=profileSubBtnTextS'abonner à YoutZospan button div !-- SKINS LIKÉS -- div class=profile-section style=margin-top20px; div class=upload-drop-txtClique ou glisse une imagediv div id=uploadFileName style=margin-top6px;font-size9px;colorvar(--gold);font-familyOrbitron,sans-serif;letter-spacing2px;div div input type=file class=detail-stats-row id=detailStatsdiv !-- Download button pinned at top -- button class=detail-dl-btn id=detailDlBtn⬇ Télécharger le Skinbutton div class=detail-license id=detailSubBtn onclick=fbToggleSubscribe()✦ span id=detailSubTextS'abonner à YoutZospanbutton !-- Info rows -- div class=detail-info-row span class=detail-info-icon🎮span span class=detail-info-labelChampionspan span class=detail-info-value id=detailInfoChampspan div div class=detail-info-row span class=detail-info-icon⚙️span span class=detail-info-labelWorks onspan span class=detail-info-valueDefault Skinspan div div class=detail-info-row span class=detail-info-icon🏷️span span class=detail-info-labelCatégoriespan span class=detail-info-value id=detailInfoCatspan div class=detail-info-icon✨span span class=detail-info-labelFeaturesspan span class=detail-info-valueModel · VFX · Voicespan div div class=detail-info-row span class=detail-info-icon📄span span class=detail-info-labelLicensespan span class=detail-info-valueCC-BY-NCspan div !-- Creator -- div class=detail-creator-box div class=detail-creator-avatarYdiv div div class=detail-creator-nameYoutZo ✦div div class=detail-creator-roleCréateur · Custom Skin Artistdiv div div div div div div script ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ ★ AJOUTE TES SKINS ICI ★ id → numéro unique (0, 1, 2 ...) champ → nom du champion ex Miss Fortune name → nom du skin ex Nami Christmas Edition role → top mid jungle adc support cat → anime lol jv noel halloween badge → new hot null img → chemin ou URL de l'image (null = placeholder) dlUrl → lien de téléchargement (# = pas encore dispo) videoId → ID YouTube pour la preview ex dQw4w9WgXcQ (null = affiche l'image) desc → description du skin (texte libre) ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ const SKINS = [ 82 - Vladimir Gojo { id 82, champ Vladimir, name Gojo, role MID, cat anime, badge #, img Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Hisoka Morow (Hunter x Hunter) · Reworked animations with Bungee Gum card-throwing style · New visual effects featuring pink & purple Nen-infused playing cards · Recolored & retextured abilities with Hisoka's iconic magician clown aesthetic. }, { id 0, champ Miss Fortune, name Nami Christmas Edition, role adc, cat noel, badge null, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774816219minia_discord_tcxkpj.jpg, dlUrl httpswork.ink2rD0miss-fortnue-nami-christmas-edition, videoId qdBi6Mysxag, desc Un skin festif transformant Miss Fortune en Nami pour les fêtes de Noël. Remplace le modèle, les effets visuels et la voix. Fonctionne sur le skin de base. }, 1 - Aizawa Sylas Christmas { id 1, champ Sylas, name Aizawa Christmas Edition, role mid, cat noel, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774816157minia_aizawa_xmrbn2.png, dlUrl #, videoId _JmjyK4JAl4, desc Introducing the FREE Christmas Aizawa Skin for Sylas! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Aizawa – Christmas Edition · Reworked animations with a cold, winter-themed restraint style · New visual effects featuring snow chains, icy energy & festive sparks · Recolored & retextured abilities with dark winter & Christmas tones. }, 2 - Anya Milio Christmas { id 2, champ Milio, name Anya Christmas Edition, role support, cat noel, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774816187minia_anya_fhz2sn.png, dlUrl #, videoId XLUfqJqc1d4, desc Introducing the FREE Christmas Anya Skin for Milio! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Anya (Spy x Family) – Christmas Edition · Reworked animations with cute festive magic · New visual effects featuring hearts, snowflakes & warm Christmas light · Recolored & retextured abilities with pastel & holiday colors. }, 3 - Yoshino Syndra Christmas { id 3, champ Syndra, name Yoshino Christmas Edition, role mid, cat noel, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774816462minia_yoshino_o27jcc.png, dlUrl #, videoId ZtO5gQgfeIU, desc Introducing the FREE Christmas Yoshino Skin for Syndra! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Yoshino (Date A Live) – Christmas Edition · Reworked animations with ice spirit magic · New visual effects featuring snowy orbs, icy bursts & winter aura · Recolored & retextured abilities with blue, white & festive winter tones. }, 4 - Bang Lee Sin { id 4, champ Lee Sin, name Bang, role jungle, cat anime, badge null, img Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Bang (One Punch Man) · Reworked animations with a powerful martial arts style · New visual effects featuring shockwaves & energy strikes · Recolored & retextured abilities with Bang's iconic white-haired look. }, 5 - Todo Sett { id 5, champ Sett, name Todo, role top, cat anime, badge null, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774816428minia_todo_rwcgqy.png, dlUrl #, videoId 9e2Jl-w0u8M, desc Introducing the FREE Todo Skin for Sett! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Todo (Jujutsu Kaisen) · Reworked animations with brutal close-combat style · New visual effects featuring cursed energy & raw power bursts · Recolored & retextured abilities with Todo's intense fighting spirit. }, 6 - Kaido Sion { id 6, champ Sion, name Kaido, role top, cat anime, badge null, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774816356minia_kaido_hwvk6c.png, dlUrl #, videoId ezGvclEJleY, desc Introducing the FREE Kaido Skin for Sion! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Kaido (One Piece) · Reworked animations with monstrous overwhelming strength · New visual effects featuring dragon energy & destructive shockwaves · Recolored & retextured abilities with Kaido's dark imposing aura. }, 7 - Young Gojo Ryze { id 7, champ Ryze, name Young Gojo, role mid, cat anime, badge null, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774814928gojo_ryzee_dsffh5.png, dlUrl #, videoId QRqj_eye7qM, desc Introducing the FREE Young Gojo Skin for Ryze! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Young Gojo Satoru (Jujutsu Kaisen) · Reworked animations with limitless cursed technique style · New visual effects featuring infinity barriers & blue domain bursts · Recolored & retextured abilities with Gojo's signature blue-white energy. }, 8 - Escanor Zaahen { id 8, champ Zaahen, name Escanor, role top, cat anime, badge null, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774816258minia_escanor_a82zvq.png, dlUrl #, videoId Ih0asxx_-Rg, desc Introducing the FREE Escanor Skin for Zaahen! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Escanor (The Seven Deadly Sins) · Reworked animations with solar divine power style · New visual effects featuring blazing sunlight & prideful fire bursts · Recolored & retextured abilities with Escanor's golden radiant energy. }, 9 - Saitama Vi { id 9, champ Vi, name Saitama, role jungle, cat anime, badge null, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774816398minia_saitama_hissff.png, dlUrl #, videoId _iN1GCSmcb0, desc Introducing the FREE Saitama Skin for Vi! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Saitama (One Punch Man) · Reworked animations with one-punch devastation style · New visual effects featuring shockwave punches & vacuum blasts · Recolored & retextured abilities with Saitama's iconic yellow hero suit. }, 10 - Kaguya Caitlyn { id 10, champ Caitlyn, name Kaguya, role adc, cat anime, badge null, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774816314minia_kaguya_cuf2pl.png, dlUrl #, videoId 0e9sXY8WRcE, desc Introducing the FREE Kaguya Skin for Caitlyn! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Kaguya Shinomiya (Kaguya-sama Love is War) · Reworked animations with elegant precision shooting style · New visual effects featuring crimson energy shots & noble crest effects · Recolored & retextured abilities with Kaguya's refined red & black aesthetic. }, 11 - Katarina Mahito { id 11, champ Katarina, name Mahito, role mid, cat anime, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774815684Katarina_Mahito_hyhmbr.png, dlUrl #, videoId F4h1PTyiWLQ, desc Introducing the FREE Mahito Skin for Katarina! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Mahito (Jujutsu Kaisen) · Reworked animations with soul-manipulating cursed style · New visual effects featuring idle transfiguration & dark cursed energy · Recolored & retextured abilities with Mahito's eerie purple & black tones. }, 12 - Lee Sin Akaza { id 12, champ Lee Sin, name Akaza, role jungle, cat anime, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774815995Lee_Sin_Akaza_sm1qvt.png, dlUrl #, videoId YFTWlSyP0g4, desc Introducing the FREE Akaza Skin for Lee Sin! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Akaza (Demon Slayer) · Reworked animations with Blood Demon Art martial style · New visual effects featuring crimson shockwaves & destructive combat forms · Recolored & retextured abilities with Akaza's iconic blue-stripe demon aesthetic. }, 13 - Talon Mikasa { id 13, champ Talon, name Mikasa, role jungle, cat anime, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774817105Talon_Mikasa_ylhitz.png, dlUrl #, videoId LdQV7EtwO8c, desc Introducing the FREE Mikasa Skin for Talon! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Captain Levi (Attack on Titan) · Reworked animations with lightning-fast ODM blade style · New visual effects featuring razor-sharp slashes & titan-killing strikes · Recolored & retextured abilities with Levi's dark scout regiment aesthetic. }, 15 - Lee Sin Mikey { id 15, champ Lee Sin, name Mikey, role jungle, cat anime, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774816032Lee_Sin_Mikey_ckxk3a.png, dlUrl #, videoId 6J1rEdlWLp8, desc Introducing the FREE Mikey Skin for Lee Sin! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Mikey (Tokyo Revengers) · Reworked animations with Toman gang fighting style · New visual effects featuring powerful kicks & delinquent energy · Recolored & retextured abilities with Mikey's iconic black school uniform look. }, 16 - Samira Siesta { id 16, champ Samira, name Siesta, role adc, cat anime, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774816812samira_siesta_ewmagt.png, dlUrl #, videoId LIC6x0bXbrk, desc Introducing the FREE Siesta Skin for Samira! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Siesta (The Detective is Already Dead) · Reworked animations with elegant detective combat style · New visual effects featuring white rose petals & precise bullet trails · Recolored & retextured abilities with Siesta's iconic white maid aesthetic. }, 17 - Kassadin Tenka { id 17, champ Kassadin, name Tenka, role mid, cat anime, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774815544Kassadin_tenka_nkxs5r.png, dlUrl #, videoId t9KdfUSCq74, desc Introducing the FREE Tenka Skin for Kassadin! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Tenka Izumo (Chivalry of a Failed Knight) · Reworked animations with noble swordsmanship style · New visual effects featuring radiant military energy & golden void bursts · Recolored & retextured abilities with Tenka's gold & black imperial uniform. }, 18 - Ahri Yamada { id 18, champ Ahri, name Yamada, role mid, cat anime, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774809866ahri_yamada_jq0hv4.png, dlUrl #, videoId PccV1QzRxbo, desc Introducing the FREE Yamada Skin for Ahri! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Yamada (My Love Story with Yamada-kun) · Reworked animations with charming school-girl style · New visual effects featuring pastel hearts & cute orb trails · Recolored & retextured abilities with Yamada's soft black & white school aesthetic. }, 19 - Zoe Waguri { id 19, champ Zoe, name Waguri, role mid, cat anime, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774817561Zoe_Waguri_ik3ygt.png, dlUrl #, videoId 3n0CnZ5eMgo, desc Introducing the FREE Waguri Skin for Zoe! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Waguri (Oshi no Ko) · Reworked animations with idol-inspired playful style · New visual effects featuring sparkly pink bubbles & star-shaped bursts · Recolored & retextured abilities with Waguri's cute pink & white idol look. }, 20 - Ashe Sasha { id 20, champ Ashe, name Sasha, role adc, cat anime, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774809548aash_sahsa_utnxuq.png, dlUrl #, videoId 7pwNkOb3BTY, desc Introducing the FREE Sasha Skin for Ashe! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Toji Fushiguro (Jujutsu Kaisen) · Reworked animations with raw physical combat mastery · New visual effects featuring spirit chain & brutal chain strikes · Recolored & retextured abilities with Toji's iconic dark scar-faced mercenary look. }, 25 - Yasuo Tanjiro { id 25, champ Yasuo, name Tanjiro, role mid, cat anime, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774817150tanjro_yasuo_motmvd.png, dlUrl #, videoId 0DiuKWF2ASo, desc Introducing the FREE Tanjiro Skin for Yasuo! dlUrl #, videoId 8v9GSoTZAgw, desc Introducing the FREE Gojo Skin for Ryze! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Satoru Gojo (Jujutsu Kaisen) · Reworked animations with Infinity & Six Eyes technique style · New visual effects featuring blue void domain bursts & limitless energy · Recolored & retextured abilities with Gojo's iconic white-haired blindfolded look. }, 29 - Vladimir Muzan { id 29, champ Vladimir, name Muzan, role mid, cat anime, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774816609muuzan_vlad_qtbtzn.png, dlUrl #, videoId WUSHBGVRIt8, desc Introducing the FREE Muzan Skin for Vladimir! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Muzan Kibutsuji (Demon Slayer) · Reworked animations with demon king blood manipulation style · New visual effects featuring dark crimson blood arts & demonic aura · Recolored & retextured abilities with Muzan's iconic black-suited demon lord aesthetic. }, 30 - LeBlanc Frieren { id 30, champ LeBlanc, name Frieren, role mid, cat anime, badge new, img httpsres.cloudinary.comdmmcvijsoimageuploadv1774815821leblanc_frieren_ryaque.png, dlUrl #, videoId dGn2k_T0n_I, desc Introducing the FREE Frieren Skin for LeBlanc! Features Custom 3D Model inspired by Frieren (Frieren Beyond Journey's End) · Reworked animations with ancient elven spellcasting style · New visual effects featuring silver magical clones & icy arcane runes · Recolored & retextured abilities with Frieren's iconic white long-haired elf look. }, ]; ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ ── SUPABASE CONFIG ── const SUPABASE_URL = 'httpsmzanqvfhigbiaybkvdgw.supabase.co'; const SUPABASE_KEY = 'sb_publishable_HqovzbyTHy9LxZ_F0IDkDw_be8CFyXT'; const views = {}; const downloads = {}; let globalDl = 0; let globalViews = 0; SKINS.forEach(s = { views[s.id] = 0; downloads[s.id] = 0; }); async function loadAllStats() { try { const res = await fetch(SUPABASE_URL + 'restv1skin_viewsselect=skin_id,views,downloads', { headers { 'apikey' SUPABASE_KEY, 'Authorization' 'Bearer ' + SUPABASE_KEY } }); const rows = await res.json(); if (!Array.isArray(rows)) return; rows.forEach(row = { if (views[row.skin_id] !== undefined) { views[row.skin_id] = row.views 0; downloads[row.skin_id] = row.downloads 0; globalViews += row.views 0; globalDl += row.downloads 0; } }); updateGlobals(); render(); } catch(e) { render(); } } async function sbUpsert(skinId) { try { await fetch(SUPABASE_URL + 'restv1skin_views', { method 'POST', headers { 'apikey' SUPABASE_KEY, 'Authorization' 'Bearer ' + SUPABASE_KEY, 'Content-Type' 'applicationjson', 'Prefer' 'resolution=merge-duplicates' }, body JSON.stringify({ skin_id skinId, views views[skinId], downloads downloads[skinId] }) }); } catch(e) {} } async function incrementView(skinId) { views[skinId] = (views[skinId] 0) + 1; globalViews++; await sbUpsert(skinId); } async function incrementDownload(skinId) { downloads[skinId] = (downloads[skinId] 0) + 1; globalDl++; await sbUpsert(skinId); } let roleFilter = 'all'; let catFilter = 'all'; let searchQ = ''; ── DETAIL PAGE ── const styleLabel = { anime'Animé', lol'Style LoL', jv'Jeu Vidéo', noel'Noël', halloween'Halloween' }; const styleClass = { anime'style-anime', lol'style-lol', jv'style-jv', noel'style-noel', halloween'style-halloween' }; function openDetail(id) { const s = SKINS.find(x = x.id === id); if (!s) return; const roleLabel = { top'Top', mid'Mid', jungle'Jungle', adc'ADC', support'Support' }; const catFull = { anime'Animé', lol'Style LoL', jv'Jeu Vidéo', noel'Noël', halloween'Halloween' }; Hero banner document.getElementById('detailHeroChamp').textContent = s.champ; document.getElementById('detailHeroName').textContent = s.name; document.getElementById('detailBreadcrumb').textContent = s.name; const heroImg = document.getElementById('detailHeroImg'); if (s.img) { heroImg.src = s.img; heroImg.style.display='block'; } else { heroImg.style.display='none'; } Info card document.getElementById('detailInfoChamp').textContent = s.champ; document.getElementById('detailInfoCat').textContent = catFull[s.cat] s.cat; document.getElementById('detailInfoRole').textContent = roleLabel[s.role] s.role.toUpperCase(); Video const vWrap = document.getElementById('detailVideoWrap'); if (s.videoId) { vWrap.innerHTML = `iframe src=httpswww.youtube.comembed${s.videoId}autoplay=1 allow=autoplay; fullscreen allowfullscreen style=width100%;height100%;bordernone;iframe`; } else if (s.img) { vWrap.innerHTML = `img src=${s.img} style=width100%;height100%;object-fitcover;displayblock; alt=${s.name}`; } else { vWrap.innerHTML = `div class=detail-video-placeholder🎮spanAperçu bientôt disponiblespandiv`; } Description document.getElementById('detailDesc').textContent = s.desc `Skin custom ${s.name} pour ${s.champ}. Téléchargement gratuit.`; Features tags const feats = ['Custom 3D Model', 'Visual Effects', 'Voice Over', 'Animations']; document.getElementById('detailFeatures').innerHTML = feats.map(f = `span class=detail-feature-tag${f}span` ).join(''); Stats document.getElementById('detailStats').innerHTML = ` div class=detail-statspan class=detail-stat-num👁 ${views[id]0}spanspan class=detail-stat-lblVuesspandiv div class=detail-statspan class=detail-stat-num⬇ ${downloads[id]0}spanspan class=detail-stat-lblTéléchargementsspandiv div class=detail-statspan class=detail-stat-num♡ 0spanspan class=detail-stat-lblFavorisspandiv `; Download button const dlBtn = document.getElementById('detailDlBtn'); dlBtn.textContent = '⬇ Télécharger le Skin'; dlBtn.classList.remove('done'); dlBtn.onclick = async () = { await incrementDownload(id); updateGlobals(); refresh stats document.getElementById('detailStats').innerHTML = ` div class=detail-statspan class=detail-stat-num👁 ${views[id]0}spanspan class=detail-stat-lblVuesspandiv div class=detail-statspan class=detail-stat-num⬇ ${downloads[id]0}spanspan class=detail-stat-lblTéléchargementsspandiv div class=detail-statspan class=detail-stat-num♡ 0spanspan class=detail-stat-lblFavorisspandiv `; dlBtn.textContent = '✓ Téléchargement lancé !'; dlBtn.classList.add('done'); setTimeout(() = { dlBtn.textContent='⬇ Télécharger le Skin'; dlBtn.classList.remove('done'); }, 3000); if (s.dlUrl && s.dlUrl !== '#') window.open(s.dlUrl, '_blank'); }; const overlay = document.getElementById('detailOverlay'); overlay.classList.add('open'); overlay.scrollTop = 0; document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } document.getElementById('detailBack').addEventListener('click', () = { document.getElementById('detailOverlay').classList.remove('open'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; }); function updateGlobals() { document.getElementById('g-skins').textContent = SKINS.length; document.getElementById('g-champs').textContent = [...new Set(SKINS.map(s=s.champ))].length; ['g-dl','g-views'].forEach(id = { const el = document.getElementById(id); el.textContent = id === 'g-dl' globalDl globalViews; el.classList.remove('pop'); void el.offsetWidth; el.classList.add('pop'); }); } const SKINS_PER_PAGE = 20; let currentPage = 1; function renderPagination(totalFiltered) { const pag = document.getElementById('pagination'); const totalPages = Math.ceil(totalFiltered SKINS_PER_PAGE); if (totalPages = 1) { pag.innerHTML = ''; return; } let html = ''; html += `button class=page-btn onclick=goToPage(${currentPage - 1}) ${currentPage === 1 'disabled' ''}← Précbutton`; for (let i = 1; i = totalPages; i++) { html += `button class=page-btn ${i === currentPage 'active' ''} onclick=goToPage(${i})${i}button`; } html += `button class=page-btn onclick=goToPage(${currentPage + 1}) ${currentPage === totalPages 'disabled' ''}Suiv →button`; pag.innerHTML = html; } function goToPage(page) { currentPage = page; render(); window.scrollTo({ top 0, behavior 'smooth' }); } function render() { const grid = document.getElementById('grid'); const filtered = SKINS.filter(s = { const okRole = roleFilter === 'all' s.role === roleFilter; const okCat = catFilter === 'all' (catFilter === 'new' && s.badge === 'new') (catFilter === 'hot' && s.badge === 'hot') s.cat === catFilter; const q = searchQ.toLowerCase(); const okSearch = !q s.champ.toLowerCase().includes(q) s.name.toLowerCase().includes(q); return okRole && okCat && okSearch; }); if (!filtered.length) { grid.innerHTML = 'div class=empty— Aucun skin trouvé —div'; return; } const totalFiltered = filtered.length; const totalPages = Math.ceil(totalFiltered SKINS_PER_PAGE); if (currentPage totalPages) currentPage = 1; const start = (currentPage - 1) SKINS_PER_PAGE; const paginated = filtered.slice(start, start + SKINS_PER_PAGE); renderPagination(totalFiltered); grid.innerHTML = paginated.map((s,i) = ` div class=card data-id=${s.id} style=animation-delay${i0.05}s div class=img-wrap ${s.img `img class=card-img src=${s.img} alt=${s.name} loading=lazy` `div class=img-placeholderdiv class=ph-icon🎮divdiv class=ph-txtImage à venirdivdiv`} span class=style-tag ${styleClass[s.cat]'style-lol'}${styleLabel[s.cat]s.cat}span ${s.badge==='new''span class=badge badge-newNouveauspan'''} ${s.badge==='hot''span class=badge badge-hot🔥 Hotspan'''} div class=overlaydiv div div class=card-info div class=card-champ${s.champ}div div class=card-name${s.name}div div class=card-footer span class=card-role${s.role.toUpperCase()}span div class=card-counters span class=ctr id=v-${s.id}👁 b${views[s.id]}bspan span class=ctr id=d-${s.id}⬇ b${downloads[s.id]}bspan div div div div `).join(''); grid.querySelectorAll('.card').forEach(card = { card.addEventListener('click', async (e) = { if (e.target.classList.contains('dl-btn')) return; const id = parseInt(card.dataset.id); await incrementView(id); updateGlobals(); const vEl = document.getElementById('v-' + id); if (vEl) { vEl.innerHTML = 'u{1F441} b' + views[id] + 'b'; vEl.classList.add('lit'); setTimeout(() = vEl.classList.remove('lit'), 700); } openDetail(id); }); }); } document.querySelectorAll('.nav-btn').forEach(btn = { btn.addEventListener('click', () = { document.querySelectorAll('.nav-btn').forEach(b=b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); roleFilter = btn.dataset.role; currentPage = 1; render(); }); }); document.querySelectorAll('.chip').forEach(chip = { chip.addEventListener('click', () = { document.querySelectorAll('.chip').forEach(c=c.classList.remove('active')); chip.classList.add('active'); catFilter = chip.dataset.cat; currentPage = 1; render(); }); }); document.getElementById('search').addEventListener('input', e = { searchQ = e.target.value; currentPage = 1; render(); }); updateGlobals(); loadAllStats(); ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ FIREBASE AUTH — dans le même script pour accéder à SKINSopenDetail ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ ── Toast ── function fbToast(msg) { const t = document.getElementById('toast'); t.textContent = msg; t.classList.add('show'); clearTimeout(t._tid); t._tid = setTimeout(() = t.classList.remove('show'), 2800); } window.showToast = fbToast; ── State ── let fbCurrentUser = null; let fbCurrentSkinId = null; let fbUserLikes = []; let fbIsSubscribed = false; let fbAuth, fbDb, fbStorage; ── Bootstrap Firebase ── (async () = { const { initializeApp } = await import(httpswww.gstatic.comfirebasejs11.7.1firebase-app.js); const { getAuth, GoogleAuthProvider, signInWithPopup, signInWithRedirect, getRedirectResult, onAuthStateChanged, signOut _signOut } = await import(httpswww.gstatic.comfirebasejs11.7.1firebase-auth.js); const { getFirestore, doc, getDoc, setDoc, updateDoc, arrayUnion, arrayRemove, increment } = await import(httpswww.gstatic.comfirebasejs11.7.1firebase-firestore.js); const { getStorage, ref sRef, uploadBytes, getDownloadURL } = await import(httpswww.gstatic.comfirebasejs11.7.1firebase-storage.js); const app = initializeApp({ apiKey AIzaSyBy2_hXMaKa-gK-NvbvNF4Y8uw4KOxa-bU, authDomain youtzocustomskins.firebaseapp.com, projectId youtzocustomskins, storageBucket youtzocustomskins.firebasestorage.app, messagingSenderId 512957535853, appId 1512957535853weba1b29ecf42e2e77bc91164 }); fbAuth = getAuth(app); fbDb = getFirestore(app); fbStorage = getStorage(app); ── Connexion Google ── window.signInGoogle = async () = { const provider = new GoogleAuthProvider(); provider.setCustomParameters({ prompt 'select_account' }); try { await signInWithPopup(fbAuth, provider); } catch(e) { console.error('Auth', e.code, e.message); if (['authpopup-blocked','authpopup-closed-by-user','authcancelled-popup-request'].includes(e.code)) { fbToast('Redirection...'); await signInWithRedirect(fbAuth, provider); } else if (e.code === 'authunauthorized-domain') { fbToast('Domaine non autorisé'); console.error('Ajoute ce domaine dans Firebase Console → Authentication → Authorized domains'); } else if (e.code !== 'authpopup-closed-by-user') { fbToast('Erreur ' + (e.codee.message)); } } }; Résultat après redirect getRedirectResult(fbAuth).then(r = { if (r&&r.user) fbToast('Connecté '+r.user.displayName); }).catch(()={}); ── Déconnexion ── window.fbSignOut = async () = { await _signOut(fbAuth); closeProfile(); fbToast('Déconnecté'); }; ── Auth state ── onAuthStateChanged(fbAuth, async user = { fbCurrentUser = user; const loginBtn = document.getElementById('authLoginBtn'); const avatar = document.getElementById('authAvatar'); if (user) { loginBtn.style.display = 'none'; avatar.src = user.photoURL''; avatar.style.display = 'block'; Init doc user const uRef = doc(fbDb,'users',user.uid); const snap = await getDoc(uRef); if (!snap.exists()) await setDoc(uRef,{nameuser.displayName,emailuser.email,photouser.photoURL,likes[],createdAtnew Date()}); const data = (await getDoc(uRef)).data(); fbUserLikes = data.likes[]; document.getElementById('profilePhoto').src = user.photoURL''; document.getElementById('profileName').textContent = user.displayName'Utilisateur'; document.getElementById('profileEmail').textContent = user.email''; } else { loginBtn.style.display='flex'; avatar.style.display='none'; fbUserLikes=[]; fbIsSubscribed=false; } fbRenderLikedGrid(); fbRefreshSubState(); if (fbCurrentSkinId !== null) fbRefreshLikeBtn(fbCurrentSkinId); }); ── Profile ── window.openProfile = () = { document.getElementById('profilePanel').classList.add('open'); document.getElementById('profileOverlayBg').classList.add('open'); fbRenderLikedGrid(); fbRefreshSubState(); }; window.closeProfile = () = { document.getElementById('profilePanel').classList.remove('open'); document.getElementById('profileOverlayBg').classList.remove('open'); }; ── Liked grid ── function fbRenderLikedGrid() { const grid = document.getElementById('likedGrid'); const liked = SKINS.filter(s = fbUserLikes.includes(s.id)); if (!liked.length) { grid.innerHTML='div class=profile-emptyAucun likediv'; return; } grid.innerHTML = liked.map(s=`div class=profile-skin-mini data-id=${s.id}${s.img`img src=${s.img} alt=${s.name} loading=lazy`''} div class=profile-skin-mini-infodiv class=profile-skin-mini-champ${s.champ}divdiv class=profile-skin-mini-name${s.name}divdivdiv`).join(''); grid.querySelectorAll('.profile-skin-mini').forEach(el=el.addEventListener('click',()={ closeProfile(); openDetail(parseInt(el.dataset.id)); })); } ── Like ── async function fbRefreshLikeBtn(skinId) { const btn = document.getElementById('detailLikeBtn'); if (!btn) return; let count = 0; try { const s=await getDoc(doc(fbDb,'skinLikes',String(skinId))); count=s.exists()(s.data().likes0)0; } catch(e){} const liked = fbUserLikes.includes(skinId); btn.classList.toggle('liked', liked); btn.innerHTML = (liked'❤ ''♡ ')+'span id=detailLikeCount'+count+'span Likes'; } window.fbToggleLike = async () = { if (!fbCurrentUser) { fbToast('Connecte-toi pour liker !'); return; } const skinId = fbCurrentSkinId; if (skinId === null) return; const uRef = doc(fbDb,'users',fbCurrentUser.uid); const sRef2 = doc(fbDb,'skinLikes',String(skinId)); if (fbUserLikes.includes(skinId)) { fbUserLikes = fbUserLikes.filter(x=x!==skinId); await updateDoc(uRef,{likesarrayRemove(skinId)}); await setDoc(sRef2,{likesincrement(-1)},{mergetrue}); } else { fbUserLikes.push(skinId); await updateDoc(uRef,{likesarrayUnion(skinId)}); await setDoc(sRef2,{likesincrement(1)},{mergetrue}); } await fbRefreshLikeBtn(skinId); fbRenderLikedGrid(); }; Patch openDetail — s'exécute APRÈS que openDetail est défini const _origOpenDetail = openDetail; window.openDetail = function(id) { fbCurrentSkinId = id; _origOpenDetail(id); setTimeout(()={ fbRefreshLikeBtn(id); fbRefreshSubState(); }, 80); }; ── Abonnement ── async function fbRefreshSubState() { if (!fbCurrentUser) { fbIsSubscribed=false; fbUpdateSubBtns(); return; } try { const s=await getDoc(doc(fbDb,'subscribers',fbCurrentUser.uid)); fbIsSubscribed=s.exists()&&s.data().active===true; } catch(e){ fbIsSubscribed=false; } fbUpdateSubBtns(); try { const c=await getDoc(doc(fbDb,'meta','subscriberCount')); const total=c.exists()(c.data().count0)0; const el=document.getElementById('subStatus'); if(el) el.textContent = fbIsSubscribed('✓ Abonné · '+total+' abonné'+(total1's''')) (total+' abonné'+(total1's''')); } catch(e){} } function fbUpdateSubBtns() { const states = [ {btn'detailSubBtn', txt'detailSubText'}, {btn'profileSubBtn', txt'profileSubBtnText'} ]; states.forEach(({btn,txt})={ const b=document.getElementById(btn), t=document.getElementById(txt); if(!b!t) return; b.classList.toggle('subscribed',fbIsSubscribed); t.textContent = fbIsSubscribed (btn==='profileSubBtn''✓ Abonné — Se désabonner''✓ Abonné') S'abonner à YoutZo; }); } window.fbToggleSubscribe = async () = { if (!fbCurrentUser) { fbToast(Connecte-toi pour t'abonner !); return; } const subRef = doc(fbDb,'subscribers',fbCurrentUser.uid); const metaRef = doc(fbDb,'meta','subscriberCount'); if (fbIsSubscribed) { await setDoc(subRef,{activefalse,uidfbCurrentUser.uid,updatedAtnew Date()},{mergetrue}); await setDoc(metaRef,{countincrement(-1)},{mergetrue}); fbIsSubscribed=false; fbToast('Désabonné'); } else { await setDoc(subRef,{activetrue,uidfbCurrentUser.uid,namefbCurrentUser.displayName,emailfbCurrentUser.email,photofbCurrentUser.photoURL,subscribedAtnew Date()},{mergetrue}); await setDoc(metaRef,{countincrement(1)},{mergetrue}); fbIsSubscribed=true; fbToast('Abonné à YoutZo ✦'); } fbUpdateSubBtns(); await fbRefreshSubState(); }; ── Upload ── let fbUploadedFile = null; document.getElementById('uploadFileInput').addEventListener('change',e={ fbUploadedFile=e.target.files[0]; if(fbUploadedFile) document.getElementById('uploadFileName').textContent='✓ '+fbUploadedFile.name; }); const dz=document.getElementById('uploadDrop'); dz.addEventListener('dragover',e={e.preventDefault();dz.classList.add('dragover');}); dz.addEventListener('dragleave',()=dz.classList.remove('dragover')); dz.addEventListener('drop',e={e.preventDefault();dz.classList.remove('dragover');fbUploadedFile=e.dataTransfer.files[0];if(fbUploadedFile) document.getElementById('uploadFileName').textContent='✓ '+fbUploadedFile.name;}); window.fbSubmitSkin = async () = { if (!fbCurrentUser) { fbToast(Connecte-toi d'abord !); return; } const champ=document.getElementById('uploadChamp').value.trim(); const name=document.getElementById('uploadSkinName').value.trim(); const desc=document.getElementById('uploadDesc').value.trim(); const status=document.getElementById('uploadStatus'); if (!champ!name) { status.className='upload-status err'; status.textContent='Champion et nom requis !'; return; } const btn=document.getElementById('uploadBtn'); btn.disabled=true; status.className='upload-status'; status.textContent='Envoi en cours...'; try { let imageUrl=''; if (fbUploadedFile) { const r=sRef(fbStorage,'proposals'+fbCurrentUser.uid+'_'+Date.now()+'_'+fbUploadedFile.name); await uploadBytes(r,fbUploadedFile); imageUrl=await getDownloadURL(r); } await setDoc(doc(fbDb,'skinProposals',fbCurrentUser.uid+'_'+Date.now()),{userIdfbCurrentUser.uid,userNamefbCurrentUser.displayName,champ,name,desc,imageUrl,status'pending',createdAtnew Date()}); status.className='upload-status ok'; status.textContent='✓ Proposition envoyée !'; ['uploadChamp','uploadSkinName','uploadDesc'].forEach(id=document.getElementById(id).value=''); document.getElementById('uploadFileName').textContent=''; fbUploadedFile=null; fbToast('Proposition envoyée ✓'); } catch(e){ status.className='upload-status err'; status.textContent='Erreur '+e.message; } btn.disabled=false; }; })(); fin IIFE async script body html
